titleZh: 深圳经济特区股份有限公司设立条件和设立程序规定
titleEn: Rules of Shenzhen Special Economic Zone on Requirements and Procedures for Incorporation of Joint-Stock Limited Companies
shortTitle: 深圳股份公司设立程序规定（1994）
aliases: 深圳市人民政府令第39号
summaryZh: 这份1994年深圳政府规章细化了股份有限公司以发起设立、募集设立方式成立时的资本门槛、发起人条件和登记程序，是理解深圳早期公司设立制度的重要补充资料。
summaryEn: This 1994 Shenzhen government rule elaborated the capital thresholds, promoter requirements, and registration procedures for sponsor and public-share incorporation of joint-stock limited companies, making it an important supplement for understanding early Shenzhen incorporation law.

sources.label: Official English
sources.noteZh: 深圳市司法局法规规章英文译本归档页，收录1994年股份公司设立程序规定。
sources.noteEn: Archived English page in the Shenzhen Municipal Bureau of Justice database containing the 1994 joint-stock incorporation rules.
